mnemonics: Android Versions: Years Nerdly Improve Devices

keyPoints: The Open Handset Alliance is the organization behind Android
The first Android version was 1.0, released in 2008
Android Activities are the building blocks of an app
Some key features of Android include widgets, notifications, and multi-touch
The Android Architecture Stack consists of the Activity, Service, Intent, and BroadcastReceiver
The Linux Kernel is the core operating system component of Android
